title: Vietnam and Sri Lanka elevate ties to comprehensive partnership to boost trade, AI and tourism cooperation
description: Vietnam and Sri Lanka agreed to elevate their relations to a Comprehensive Partnership, aiming to boost trade, artificial intelligence collaboration, and tourism. Vietnamese President Tô Lâm, visiting Sri Lanka, announced the enhanced bilateral framework during the official visit. The announcement emphasizes expanded cooperation across multiple sectors. source http://www.adaderana.lk/news.php?nid=122257

title: Lateef, Mo Bimpe deny viral AI baby photos after triplets’ arrival
description: Popular Nollywood couple, Lateef Adedimeji and Adebimpe Oyebade, have dismissed viral Artificial Intelligence-generated baby photos being circulated online following the announcement of the birth of their triplet sons. The actress, popularly known as Mo Bimpe, appealed to bloggers, fans and well-wishers to stop sharing the edited images, stressing that the pictures do not belong to [...]
